title: Sulla Routine ROUTINE.md Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block at the top of ROUTINE.md. Kept intentionally thin — all structured metadata lives in routine.yaml. Frontmatter is a back-pointer so the LLM can identify which routine and version it is reading when ROUTINE.md is loaded into context independently.

routine.description: The routine slug. MUST equal the `slug` field in routine.yaml.

version.description: The routine version. MUST equal the `version` field in routine.yaml.

title.description: Optional display title. Purely cosmetic, falls back to routine.yaml `name`.
